entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,203Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 150

Summary: Flatmates can be a real gamble. Sometimes they're normal. Sometimes they wear masks and wield guns. You move to Gotham to start at a new job at the General Hospital, but with limited options you have to move into a sketchy apartment.

entry.summary:
Author: RedSakura101

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,875Chapters: 19/19Kudos: 48

Summary: Just a collection of my different domaystic fics for 2026. All are x reader fics Characters include:Jason ToddJamie TarttDennis WhitakerMichael 'Robby' RobinavitchJack AbbotBrendon Park 'the Shark'Jesse Van Horn These have all been crossposted to my Tumblr @redsakura101 (I have not done every single day/prompt, just the ones that inspired me ♥️) Hope you enjoy!!

entry.title: Still Him, Somehow
entry.summary:
Author: Oxylli

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,810Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Losing her childhood best friend was the worst thing that was ever to happen to Melia, she thinks, running a simple life full of trouble and piles of books to run away from her lonely past and move on from Jason. Just as life starts making sense again, the new and most annnoying red-headed vigilante decides to take his claim over the streets of Gotham. To say she hates him is an understatement. Unbeknownst to her, the new vigilante is exactly the person she's needed for all these years she had lost him. Him on the other hand is hellbent on making sure she never finds out how far the two of them actually go back. Unfortunately for both of them, the universe decides its been long enough that they've been apart, and does everything in its power to force them back together.

entry.title: Last Bullet, Last Breath
entry.summary:
Author: Kmslli

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,709Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Gotham is dangerous, corrupt, and survival here is a brutal challenge. No one knows this better than those from Gotham's forgotten corners. To survive, you either have to be filthy rich or a master of the art of survival. But there is a place even more dangerous than Gotham, a place where living is nearly impossible: Zaun. A place where Gotham citizens would never dare to set foot.

entry.summary:
Author: ToTheStars8

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,404Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 472

Summary: Bruce hasn't seen Jason in over a week, and he's concerned. Tracking him down, Bruce expects to find his son either dead or up to something no good. Instead, he finds Jason living happily with a family Bruce never knew he had.

entry.title: Title of your Sex Tape
entry.summary:
Author: miryum

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,677Chapters: 23/23Kudos: 724

Summary: And then there was one. Y/n L/n. Dick sighed heavily, preparing himself for the shenanigans she would surely have gotten herself into. Dick’s gaze swept to the desk opposite Jason’s but… Y/n was sitting in her seat, cataloguing evidence. Dick’s mouth fell open. It was a miracle!  Detective!Jason Todd x detective!Reader based on Jake and Amy's relationship

entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: LicoricexWitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,150Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 214

Summary: You've always been obsessed with superheroes, ever since you were a little kid. You moved to Gotham all alone with stars in your eyes for undergrad before the cold reality of city-living set in. The streets were mean and people weren't as kind as they were back home. It was hard to make friends and you preferred to stay inside, making you even lonelier. You were a regular fish out of water, not a lot of close friends or family, living all alone--the perfect target for someone with not-so-nice intentions. They always said not to meet your heroes because they could never live up to your expectations. Or sometimes, they weren't a hero at all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Pancakes and Piercing Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,765Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 128

Summary: You work at a 24/7 diner, and its a regular shift when a new customer walks in. You've never seen him before, and he never says a word. But when you see his eyes for the first time, you know there's something different about him. Inspired by a post on tumblr by hyperfixationsgobrr (I think I have given the right credit, elaboration in author's note, please correct me if I'm wrong and I will change it) 30/05/26 - Now with Jason POV!

entry.title: Magnetic Obsession
entry.summary:
Author: Chemical_Rainbows13

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,840Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Everyone loves differently. It can depend on a variable of things. What they grew up around and how they were loved themselves. Some people love openly, showering with gifts and affection, while some love is darker, more tainted. Tainted with the need to possess and keep the other close. Those who love like this have never known another way, but sometimes they just might find each other and the love with blossom as beautiful as any other. A little reader insert I wrote on a whim, not too much use of [Y/N], she/her pronouns. Two obsessive lovers finding each other and dealing with losing and finding each other again.

entry.title: Dedicated
entry.summary:
Author: writerclaire

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,188Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 145

Summary: You haven’t been happy in years, but being a successful author meant you had a roof over your head and food that wasn’t swiped from the trash. You were content. However, your peaceful hermit days are threatened when the hate mail becomes very real death threats and you are forced to accept a bodyguard. Jason Todd doesn’t have a lot to be thankful for. Absent dad, sick mom. Homelessness. Hunger. Then came a different shitty dad. Oh, and he died once, after he was tortured by an evil clown. Now he’s back and he’s ready to give the world back what it gave to him, but he is forced to rethink his priorities when he realizes that the one good thing he ever had is in danger.
